name: Couch Cleaning
description: Pet hair removal on fabric couch
environment_block: cozy modern apartment living room with soft daylight through windows, light gray couch visibly covered in golden retriever pet hair, realistic home clutter, warm neutral tones
camera_block: shot on iPhone 15 Pro front-facing camera, handheld selfie framing, natural hand movement, slight micro-shakes, autofocus breathing, realistic phone exposure changes, vertical 9:16 TikTok format
product_interaction_block: creator slowly drags FurLift across couch surface in one satisfying motion, visibly removing thick pet hair instantly, pauses and smiles naturally at camera while showing the collected hair and clean couch result
performance_block: natural smiling, slight laugh of disbelief, casual eye contact with camera, genuine reaction expression after seeing clean couch result
platform_block: realistic TikTok UGC ad style, organic creator content, not polished commercial, fast social-media pacing
lighting_block: natural daylight, soft shadows, realistic indoor lighting, slight smartphone overexposure near windows
motion_block: slow handheld motion, natural body shifting, realistic wrist movement while filming selfie-style, smooth but imperfect movement
audio_block: subtle room ambience, dog collar movement sounds, fabric brushing sounds, quiet apartment room tone, authentic creator speaking tone
negative_prompt_block: no cinematic commercial lighting, no uncanny facial symmetry, no plastic skin, no unrealistic hand anatomy, no robotic movement, no beauty-filter look, no luxury influencer aesthetic
